# CWE-208 negative: constant-time comparison hides mismatch position (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-208-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"crypto/subtle"
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
)

// CWE-208 Observable Timing Discrepancy (mitigated)
func VerifyNonce(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, expected []byte) {
	provided := []byte(r.FormValue("nonce"))
	if len(provided) != len(expected) {
		w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
		w.WriteHeader(http.StatusUnauthorized)
		_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]string{"error": "denied"})
		return
	}
	if subtle.ConstantTimeCompare(provided, expected) != 1 {
		w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
		w.WriteHeader(http.StatusUnauthorized)
		_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]string{"error": "denied"})
		return
	}
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]string{"status": "ok"})
}
